## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass locally (`python -m pytest`)
- [ ] Code formatted with Black (`black src/ tests/ scripts/`)
- [ ] Imports sorted with isort (`isort src/ tests/ scripts/`)
- [ ] No new flake8 / mypy warnings (`flake8 src/ tests/ scripts/` and `mypy src/widss/`)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Docstrings added or updated for all public APIs
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the public API or usage has changed
